description_long: This is a large, round chocolate cake with a smooth, glossy ganache finish and colorful layered sides. The top of the cake is decorated with the words 'HAPPY BIRTHDAY MAGALI 30' in bold, multicolored block letters, with a yellow star and a red heart accentuating the center. Numerous small white candles are evenly spaced around the perimeter of the cake, adding a festive touch. The cake appears to have multiple visible layers of different colors, suggesting a rich and celebratory interior. The decorations are playful and vibrant, making the cake suitable for a milestone birthday celebration. The cake sits directly on a flat surface without any visible plate or tray.
description: A large, round chocolate birthday cake with colorful layered sides, multicolored lettering, and many small candles, topped with a star and heart.
description_view_0: The front view shows the heart and star decorations, with the colorful 'HAPPY BIRTHDAY MAGALI 30' lettering and candles clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the thickness of the cake and the even distribution of candles, with the decorations and lettering seen from an angle.
description_view_2: The direct front view displays the full birthday message, all decorative elements, and the layered sides most clearly.
description_view_3: This rear view shows the back of the heart and star decorations, with the lettering and candles partially visible from behind.
